context.pressure: The situation has not fully recovered, and your leadership identity is now under quiet pressure.
context.narrative: Things are not fully repaired. Some trust feels thinner. A few team members still hold back. You sense that your leadership is now being interpreted, not just followed. Nothing is clearly broken, but nothing is fully the same either.

choices.label: Pull back emotionally and focus only on operational execution to avoid further tension.
Maintain standards consistently and allow time to stabilize the team without forcing conversations.
Re-engage the team directly, even if uncomfortable, and begin rebuilding clarity through honest conversation.

questions.level_2: What do you still owe this team, even now?
questions.level_3: What standard are you still responsible for holding?
questions.level_4: What will others learn from how you carry this unresolved moment?
questions.level_5: Nothing is fully fixed. Who do you choose to be today?
